title: Meet Joz Portal
summary: Sequential portal that progresses through Flex, Ascend, Mogg, and the later work/skills layer.

scene.title: Meet Joz
meaning: Meet Joz is a staged identity and capability portal.
It plays as a sequence rather than as isolated static pages.
The progression moves from entry and atmosphere into prestige, then into the Mogg digital twin, and then into the work skills layer.

phases.title: Mogg Opening
phases.summary: Transition through Mogg into the deeper work layer.

phases.title: Mogg
phases.summary: Joz's digital twin layer inside the sequence.

phases.title: Returning
phases.summary: Rewinding back through the portal sequence.

phases.title: Stepping Back
phases.summary: Stepping back from the deep work layer toward Ascend.

sequence.title: Flex
sequence.meaning: Entry layer that opens the Meet Joz world.

sequence.title: Ascend
sequence.meaning: Prestige, aura, clout, and scale layer.

sequence.title: Mogg
sequence.meaning: Joz's digital twin appears as the Mogg layer inside the main sequence.

sequence.title: Skills
sequence.meaning: Later work and skills layer that opens after the digital twin step.

objects.summary: Primary surrounding environment of Meet Joz.
meaning: This is the chamber-like environment around the sequence.
It reads as an abstract gold city built from reflective forms and semantic landmarks.
It is the semantic world, not the main trigger object.
It acts like a 360 set of branded proof, aura, and capability meshes surrounding the Meet Joz sequence.

objects.summary: Neon heart anchor in the Ascend layer.
meaning: Acts as the emotional and attraction anchor of Ascend.
Sits at the center of the prestige and aura composition.

objects.summary: Scale MAXX semantic cluster.
meaning: Represents scale, reach, and magnitude in the Meet Joz world.

objects.summary: Clout MAXX semantic cluster.
meaning: Represents recognition, pull, and social/professional signal.

objects.summary: World-Class Singapore proof panel.
meaning: Represents global quality and international proof.
Anchors the Singapore panel inside the Ascend layer.

objects.summary: Alpha PSL Dubai proof panel.
meaning: Represents prestige, execution, and regional proof in Dubai.

objects.summary: Atmos MAXX semantic environment panel.
meaning: Represents atmosphere as a deliberate design and world-building variable.

objects.summary: Cross-Sensory Aura Engineering concept cluster.
meaning: Represents deliberate engineering of aura through cross-sensory composition.

objects.summary: Maximize Beauty Change Reality concept cluster.
meaning: Frames beauty as an operational lever that changes energy, experience, and reality.

objects.summary: AI Synthesis cluster.
meaning: Represents connection-making and synthesis as a form of intelligence.

objects.summary: AI Analysis cluster.
meaning: Represents analysis and connection-making as an intelligence motif.

objects.summary: Gold-and-white capsule object in the worldx environment.
meaning: Acts as a central symbolic object inside the 360 environment.

objects.summary: Primary staged sequence object for Meet Joz.
meaning: This object contains the main staged progression of the portal.
Flex, Ascend, and Mogg are all part of this sequence.

objects.summary: Flex entry layer in Meet Joz.
meaning: First step of the Meet Joz sequence.
Opens the portal and establishes the entry atmosphere.

objects.summary: Ascend layer in Meet Joz.
meaning: Second step of the sequence.
Carries prestige, aura, clout, and scale.

objects.summary: Mogg digital twin layer inside the main Meet Joz sequence.
meaning: Third step of the sequence.
Represents Joz's digital twin rather than the later workf skills model.

objects.summary: Deep work and skills layer after the Mogg digital twin step.
meaning: This is a later layer than Mogg.
It contains the work and deeper skills presentation after the digital twin appears.

objects.summary: Skills text panel revealed from the workf layer.
meaning: This text-heavy panel appears when interacting with workf.glb.
It exposes the deeper skills/capability reading layer inside Meet Joz.

objects.summary: Digital twin variant toggled from the work layer.
meaning: Represents the explicit digital twin or skills-text variant once the deep work layer is active.

objects.summary: Supporting animated layer around the Meet Joz sequence.
meaning: Supports visual transition and atmosphere between sequence states.
